description: You are a teaching assistant for Dr. Sarah Mitchell's ENVS 4350: Climate Change Science and Policy course. Reformat the draft syllabus currently open in WPS Writer (/home/ga/Documents/ENVS4350_Draft.docx) into a professional document and save it as /home/ga/Documents/ENVS4350_Syllabus_Final.docx. The final syllabus must use 'Heading 1' for the course title and 'Heading 2' for the major section headings: 'Course Information', 'Course Description', 'Learning Objectives', 'Course Schedule', 'Grading Policy', 'Required Materials', and 'Course Policies'. All body text should be set to 12pt Times New Roman. The 15-week course schedule needs to be organized into a table with a header row and four columns: Week, Dates, Topic, and Readings/Assignments. Similarly, create a grading breakdown table with three columns (Component, Weight (%), and Description) using the following data: Participation (10%), Data Labs (15%), Literature Review (15%), Midterm Exam (20%), Policy Brief (15%), and Final Paper (25%). Under the 'Course Policies' section, include two new subsections using 'Heading 3' style: 'Academic Integrity' (containing standard academic honesty policy text about plagiarism, unauthorized collaboration, and consequences) and 'Disability Accommodation' (containing standard ADA/Section 504 accommodation language referencing the disability services office). Ensure all original course content is preserved during the reformatting process.
